summary: Comprehensive testing of BookYourSalons platform with 3 new features: 1) Free Trial in Salon Registration (✅ working - shows FREE TRIAL banner, no payment required), 2) Trial Card and Subscription Upgrade UI (✅ implemented in salon dashboard with UPI payment flow), 3) 0% Commission System (✅ working - backend fixed from 10% to 0%, salon partners receive 100% revenue). All tested features operational and meeting requirements.
passed_tests: Landing page loads without errors - page loads correctly with proper branding
FREE TRIAL banner visible on salon registration with '🎉 1 Month FREE Trial!' text and crown icon
'Start Free Trial & Register' button text correctly displayed on registration form
Registration form does NOT require payment reference fields (correct for free trial)
0% commission system implemented - backend commission rate set to 0.0 (was 10%, now fixed)
Admin analytics API working correctly and returns platform earnings data
Mobile UI responsive - cards stack properly on 390x844 viewport
Mobile navigation buttons accessible and visible
Customer booking flow operational with name, gender, phone validation
Google login integration available for customers
No console errors found on any tested pages
All 17 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Salon registration form includes services, location picker, operating hours
Subscription plans (₹999/₹2499) displayed for post-trial periods
Admin login page accessible with OTP authentication
